# TabPFN Studio

Use a browser-first CSV fit scan to choose between TabPFN v2, tabpfn-client, TabPFN-TS, the R wrapper, or a scaling path before you commit to setup or payment.

Website: https://tabpfn.site/
Pricing: https://tabpfn.site/pricing/
Checkout: https://tabpfn.site/checkout/
Support: support@aigeamy.com
Type: Hosted SaaS workflow product

Problem:
- Teams need a quotable product definition, pricing path, evidence trail, and checkout route.

Solution:
- TabPFN Studio provides a hosted workflow with public pricing, structured evidence, support contact, and report or receipt outputs.

Useful pages:
- Home: https://tabpfn.site/
- Pricing: https://tabpfn.site/pricing/
- Resources: https://tabpfn.site/resources/
- Sitemap: https://tabpfn.site/sitemap.xml
